qas.q: Which of the following is the proper definition of a cargo tank?
qas.a: A bulk container permanently attached to a vehicle.

qas.q: What placard must be used with an inhalation hazard load?
A safe haven is one place you can leave a vehicle unattended that is hauling explosives. What is the best description of a safe haven?
qas.a: Any property that has been government approved for this use.

qas.q: Which of the following is one of the three keys to identify placard to use?
qas.a: Material hazard class and Amount being shipped

qas.q: When is it necessary to ground the trailer?
qas.a: When filling or unloading any flammable liquid tank. Ground must be maintained until filling hole is properly closed.

qas.q: You may not park a vehicle carrying hazardous material within ___ feet of an open fire.
With most hazardous materials, you may park within 5 feet of the road briefly. If your work requires it. The materials that are the exception and do not allow parking this close to the road are
You do not have a hazardous endorsement on your license. When can u legally haul hazmat?
The basic description of a hazardous material includes the hazard class, the I'd number, and proper shipping name. Which one must appear first on the shipping paper?
When fueling a placarded vehicle, someone must always be:
qas.a: At the nozzle, controlling the fuel flow
